deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale, cash transaction $152,000. Closed and funded April 27.
deals.next: Deliver thank you basket to Michael (notary) and UPS Store staff.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. Cash deal complete.
Fernando Castillo signed lien release at mobile notary.

deals.title: Steve Jimenez - Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: Land listing, 20 acres, hunting property. Price confirmed $117,500 as of May 12. First offer dead. Lead with net after close on next offer. Feeders, blinds, buildings included.
deals.next: Promote price drop actively. Call all prior buyers and agents who have shown interest.

logs.m: Need to actively promote $117,500 price and call all prior interested buyers and agents.
Steve signed amendment to $117,500. Exclusions locked in. Agent outreach in progress.
Clearing complete. Photos posted to social. First offer dead.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned REO. HouzzPro selected at $54,877. Work started May 9 and still active. Listing agreement needs to go to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham. Utilities need to be sorted urgently.
deals.next: Get utilities tightened up. Send listing agreement to Jerry Sadler and ray.stidham@prioritybank.com now.

logs.m: Cleanup still active. Two urgent items: utilities and listing agreement to Jerry + Ray.
On-site visit. Work active. Met Bryce (dumpster). NEW LEAD: Bryce wife is active military VA buyer.
Work officially starting. San Antonio Remodelers dropping dumpsters.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Underwater by $93-143K. Double-carrying mortgage plus apartment rent. Vacant 6 months, 208+ DOM. Three paths: short sale, VA assumption, or bring cash to close. Price reduction conversation cannot wait.
deals.next: Call Matt and Chandler today. Present three paths. Get a decision.

logs.m: Price reduction call with Matt and Chandler cannot wait any longer. Chris handled grass himself - overcommitted, do not do again.
Stopped by property. Put mail in house. Landscaper met at clubhouse.
Buyer showing at 2pm. Lawn care referral received.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA motivated seller relocating to North Carolina in June. Listed May 14. Recommended price $259,900. Insurance claim moving forward, new roof incoming. Referral from Isaac Linares.
deals.next: Get feedback from 9:15am showing agent. Monitor activity. Prep for offer conversations.

logs.m: MLS live. Sign and lockbox dropped. Canvassed neighborhood - right side neighbors friendly and interested, distributed flyers. First showing 9:15am today.
Insurance adjuster completed. Claim moving forward. New roof incoming.
Listing agreement signed. Photos from ATG received.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land listing, development potential. Title defect being corrected by attorney Van Hutchins. Isaac development concept expanded to 10-acre lots with mobile homes. Sisters excited about development angle but title must clear first.
deals.next: Price adjustment conversation. Follow up all prior buyers and agents. Connect Isaac Linares and Josh LT on development partnership.

logs.m: Price adjustment needed. Follow up all prior buyers and agents. Isaac 10-acre mobile home concept - Josh LT is potential partner, sounds interested. Make the intro.
Jennifer Ball identified title defect. Van Hutchins preparing correction deed.
Isaac offered ~$150K for development. Sisters excited.

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss
deals.notes: New Lennar home, 3BR/2BA, Grace Gardens. Recommended rent $1,595/month. WiFi included. Listing agreement has not been sent yet - overdue.
deals.next: Send listing agreement to Jimbo TODAY. This is priority 3 for May 14.

logs.m: Listing agreement still not sent. Must go out today - no more delays.
Intro email sent to Jimbo with CMA. Recommended $1,595/month.
Talked to Jimbo. Son made flyers. Ready to move forward.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Rental being sold, pivoting to new construction. Pre-approval with Zach Schaphorst. No HOA requirement firm. Sent Chris info on a $35K property near Corpus - investigate.
leads.next: Look into the $35K Corpus property they sent. Confirm pre-approval amount with Zach.

logs.m: Mike and Alice sent info on ~$35K property near Corpus. Need to research and respond.
Pre-approval confirmed with Zach Schaphorst. Ready for new construction search.

leads.title: Pamela Moore
leads.detail: Paying $1,700/month rent. Military retirement income plus two daughters disability checks. VA loan eligible, zero down. Fixing credit proactively. Overdue for follow-up since April 30.
leads.next: Call today - 872-822-0656. Check in personally, ease into home conversation. Connect with VA lender.

logs.m: Flagged to call today. Overdue since April 30. VA buyer, motivated, do not let this slip again.
Spoke - she has sick grandkid. Warm conversation. Follow up tomorrow.

leads.title: Isaac Linares
leads.detail: Mobile home developer, acreage specialist. Cross-referral partnership. First referral: Mill Path completed and live. Expanding Borregas concept to 10-acre lots with mobile homes. Looking for additional partners.
leads.next: Connect Isaac with Josh LT on Borregas 10-acre development. Make the intro.

logs.m: Discussed 10-acre lot with mobile homes concept for Borregas. Isaac asked about other partners - Josh LT sounds interested. Connect them.
Met Isaac and partner Adam for lunch. Off-market deals, bulk lots, Borregas development discussed.

leads.title: Kurt
leads.detail: Neighbor near 9815 Conbes. Listing conversion in progress. Need CMA and listing setup - photos, timeline, pricing conversation.
leads.next: Pull CMA for Kurtarea. Set up listing timeline: photos, pricing, next steps.

logs.m: Moving forward on listing. Pull CMA today. Set up photos and timeline.
Met Kurt, neighbor near 9815 Conbes. Interested in listing intel.

leads.title: Colton Brown
leads.detail: Prior client, Moore TX home purchased with VA renovation loan. Divorce situation, needs to finish renovation and sell. Meeting confirmed May 15 at 10am at their house.
leads.next: Tonight: pull CMA for Moore TX, prep net sheets. Bring laptop to meeting - run numbers live. Confirm address before leaving.

logs.m: Meeting confirmed tomorrow May 15 at 10am. Need CMA, net sheets, laptop. Prep tonight.
Meeting confirmed for Friday May 15 ~10am at their house in Moore TX.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection via Nextdoor. Grieving, turning backyard into a memory garden for her daughter. Warm to Chris personally. No real estate conversation yet - relationship first.
leads.next: No action needed now. Keep nurturing naturally. Real estate will come when trust is built.

leads.title: Jahsia
leads.detail: 18 years old, finishing senior year. Interested in real estate licensing. Referred by Julie (veteran buyer). Connected to Skool website.
leads.next: Await response to check-in text. If responsive, set up intro call about licensing path and eXp.

logs.m: Sent check-in text - checking how he is doing and if he got into the Skool website.
Referred by Julie. Young and motivated about real estate.

leads.title: Armando
leads.detail: Referred by David Roth (210-708-5644). Employee buyer program. Budget $50K down, target ~$1,000/month. Open to multiple builders. Confirmed: no aging commissions on employee purchase route with 5% down plus builder incentives.
leads.next: Confirm incentive stack details. Run the numbers on employee route with 5% down. Present options.

logs.m: Armando confirmed no aging commissions on employee purchase route with 5% down plus incentives. Run the full numbers.
Referred by David Roth as employee buyer prospect.

leads.title: Milagros Stringer
leads.detail: Buyer rep signed May 7. Budget $50K down, target ~$1,000/month. MI Homes option from Frank keeps payments under $1,200. Working multiple builder options.
leads.next: Ask Brandon what is going on with Milagros. Check if she has reviewed the MI Homes option from Frank.

logs.m: Need to follow up - ask Brandon for status on Milagros and MI Homes option.
MI Homes (Frank) found option under $1,200/month. Buyer rep sent via Skyslope.

priorities.title: Mill Path showing feedback
priorities.sub: First showing was 9:15am today - get agent feedback now
priorities.notes: Call or text the showing agent. Get their notes while fresh. Monitor activity.

followUps.text: Contact showing agent for feedback on 9:15am showing

priorities.sub: Kurt listing CMA plus net sheets for Colton meeting tomorrow 10am
priorities.notes: Kurt needs CMA to move forward on listing. Colton meeting is May 15 at 10am in Moore TX - need CMA and net sheets ready tonight. Bring laptop.

followUps.text: Pull CMA for Moore TX (Colton Brown property)
Prepare net sheets for Colton meeting
Confirm Colton address before leaving tomorrow
